name: ION-14382 BK3 AWS Upgrade Branch Migration
description: Migrate AWS SDK v2 upgrade changes from feature/ION-14382-bk3-aws-upgrade to a new clean branch feature/ION-14382-bk3-aws-upgrade-2 based on latest develop. Jenkins CI failing due to textual auto-merge producing compilation errors in OutboundServiceImplTest.java.

entries.summary: Current branch state: single commit with 223 booking-only file changes
entries.detail: Branch: feature/ION-14382-bk3-aws-upgrade has 1 commit (6cdba47f53) on top of local develop. 223 files changed (all booking module): 179 modified, 37 added, 7 deleted. Total: +12302/-4210 lines. Merge base with develop: 6d447a41545a961a378fad0aa47389514df69343

entries.summary: Remote develop diverged ~50 commits ahead with significant booking changes
entries.detail: origin/develop (abee9cc33d) is ~50 commits ahead of the feature branch merge base. PRs #926-#938 merged since branch was created. Non-booking changes in network/ (commercial-entity, audit-trail), oceanschedules-process/, visibility/ (wm-inbound-processor), watermill-publisher/. Booking changes include ION-14927 Supplementation CLR Logic, ION-14370 Premium Event Filtering, ION-8601 location match country fix, ION-15255 preference name correction.

entries.summary: Root cause: 5 conflicting files, Jenkins fails because new develop tests use removed EmailSenderConfig class
entries.detail:
5 files changed in both branches:
1. OutboundServiceImplTest.java — CRITICAL: develop added 172 new lines (3 new test methods using EmailSenderConfig in mock constructors + new imports for ConfirmPendingMessage, Action, Subscription, SubscriptionPreferences, PreferenceBasedEnhancements, HashMap, never). Feature branch changed EmailSenderConfig→BookingEmailConfig. Auto-merge textually succeeds but produces compilation error.
2. OutboundServiceImpl.java — develop added 3 lines (supplementation logic)
3. EnrichedAttributes.java — develop changed 2 ins/2 del
4. ConfirmPendingEmailVariablesConverterTest.java — develop changed 4 ins/4 del
5. RequestAmendEmailVariablesConverterTest.java — develop changed 4 ins/4 del

git merge-tree shows no CONFLICT markers — all auto-mergeable but semantically broken.

entries.summary: Strategy decided: cherry-pick single commit onto new branch from latest develop
entries.detail:
Strategy: Cherry-pick single commit (6cdba47f53) onto new branch feature/ION-14382-bk3-aws-upgrade-2 created from latest origin/develop. Steps:
1. Update local develop to origin/develop
2. Create new branch
3. Cherry-pick 6cdba47f53
4. Resolve 5 conflicts (critical: update new OutboundServiceImplTest lines to use BookingEmailConfig)
5. Compile → unit tests → integration tests → startup test
6. Push new branch
7. Create summary doc

Plan file: C:\Users\akundu\.copilot\session-state\c145fe0c-c70d-4883-b9d8-fc96c5d0d9f2\plan.md

entries.summary: Complete file inventory: 179 modified, 37 added, 7 deleted, 14 untracked docs
entries.detail:
Deleted files (7): CreateTables.java, DeleteTables.java, DynamoSupport.java, S3Archive.java, CreateTablesTest.java, DeleteTablesTest.java, S3ArchiveTest.java

New files (37): BookingDynamoModule, BookingEmailConfig, BookingEmailSenderModule, BookingMessagingModule, BookingDynamoDbAdminCommand, ContractAttributeConverter, 7 new converters under dynamodb/converter/, DBRecordNotFoundException, FlexibleDateDeserializer, 9 integration tests (*IT.java), 12 new unit tests

Modified files (179): All across booking module — pom.xml, build.sh, config, dao, dynamodb, model, messaging, outbound, lambda, elasticsearch, template, util, and ~60 test files

14 untracked doc files present in working tree (booking/docs/, booking-bridge/docs/, webbl/docs/)

entries.summary: Planning phase complete — ready for execution in new session
entries.detail: Analysis complete. Plan created in session plan.md with 10 TODOs tracked in SQL. All findings logged to MCP session context. Ready for execution in new session. VPN required for push step. Model: Claude Opus 4.6 (claude-opus-4.6).

entries.summary: Branch migration complete — all tests pass, app starts, commit ready
entries.detail:
Steps completed:
1. Updated local develop to origin/develop (abee9cc33d)
2. Created feature/ION-14382-bk3-aws-upgrade-2 from develop
3. Cherry-picked 6cdba47f53 — auto-merged all 5 conflict files without CONFLICT markers
4. Fixed 2 stale EmailSenderConfig→BookingEmailConfig refs in OutboundServiceImplTest.java (lines 309, 393)
5. Compilation: zero errors
6. Unit tests (Surefire): 1837 run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 1 skipped
7. Integration tests (Failsafe non-IT): 931 run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 9 skipped
8. DynamoDB IT: 138 run, 0 failures
9. Full IT suite: 149 run, 0 failures
10. Application startup: all modules initialized, all endpoints registered
11. Commit amended: 74f36e7a71 with message 'ION-14382 bk3 aws upgrade changes'
12. Summary doc created at booking/docs/2026-03-27-aws-upgrade-branch-migration-summary.md (untracked)

Branch NOT pushed to remote per user request. DESIGN-AWS2x.md confirmed in commit.

entries.summary: Complete file list appended to summary doc (223 files categorized)
entries.detail: Added complete file list (all 223 files: 37 added, 7 deleted, 179 modified) to booking/docs/2026-03-27-aws-upgrade-branch-migration-summary.md. Files are categorized by area: Build/Config, DynamoDB/Data, Messaging/S3, Outbound/Email, Lambda/Elasticsearch, Inbound, Model classes (Common, INTTRA, Request), Network Services, Service/Resource, and Tests.

entries.summary: Created Booking-dev ECS log review report
entries.detail: Created booking/docs/2026-03-27-booking-dev-log-review.md with startup assessment, all 37 initial log prompts, per-prompt summaries, raw matching lines grouped by workflowId, and MercuryRequestLoggingFilter URI entries excluding /booking/services/ping.

entries.summary: Reviewed two booking detail lambdas and wrote combined log report
entries.detail: Created booking/docs/2026-03-27-booking-lambda-log-review.md summarizing last 2 hours of application logs for inttra-int-lambda-bookingdetail-ElasticsearchLambda and inttra-int-lambda-bookingdetail-S3ArchiveLambda. ElasticsearchLambda initialized Jest/OpenSearch client, fetched BookingDetail for bookingId 76c9b33cbf8d4499b2b88e66b8496224, parsed dates 20260331 and 20260430, and indexed booking 2011967001. S3ArchiveLambda created S3 client, resolved credentials, fetched same BookingDetail, uploaded archive object to bucket inttra-int-s3-bookingdetail-s3archive, logged successful upload and wrote content location, then logged HTTP 401 Unauthorized during track and trace call before 'Completed Archive and Track n Trace'.
